_meta.description: Compiled paint product price database for Soul-Touch / Godtech AI Painting Estimator Bot
sources: Double Design Paints - Price List (undated, scanned)
Berger Paints - Updated Product Price List effective June 6, 2025
Dulux Trade Price List - effective 18th March, 2026 (CAP PLC)
Macnugar Paints & Putty - Products Price List effective 20th Jan, 2025
Revano Classic Paints (Apollux Interiors and Paint Limited) - Price List effective October 2025
notes: Berger and Dulux prices listed include 7.5% VAT in the 'price_incl_vat' field; 'price_excl_vat' is the pre-VAT standard price.
Double Design and Macnugar price lists do not separately itemize VAT; treat listed prices as final.
Revano prices are listed in their source as '■' currency symbol, interpreted as Naira (₦) based on context and magnitude.

Coverage rates (m² per litre) are NOT printed on any of these price lists. Where used in the estimator, coverage assumptions are sourced from general industry standards and should be confirmed/adjusted by GOD Nwankwo based on field experience.
Where a brand's pack uses 'Deep Colour' or 'Extra Deep Colour' tiers, these attract a higher base price reflecting the additional tinting concentrate needed.

double_design.dealer_note: Soul-Touch / Godtech AI default recommended brand. Always show first.

double_design.deep_colour_note: Special Deep Colours incur 20% additional charges (per Double Design price list).
double_design.discount_note: Discount % to be negotiated directly with this dealer and entered here once agreed. Currently null = no discount applied.

thinners.note: All thinner variants priced identically at ₦7,348.78 (excl. VAT) / ₦7,899.94 (incl. VAT) per 1L. Variants: General Purpose, Road Marking, QD, ANAMMCQ, Etch Primer, Cellulose, Cellulose Retarder, Lignolac PU, Alkyd, Chloro-Rubber, Epoxy, Acrylic PU.

berger.deep_colour_note: Deep Colours (Luxol range): Golden Brown, Rich Brown, Tile Red, Brilliant Blue, Chocolate, Light Green, Copper, Laterite Red, Coconut Brown, Coral, Royal Blue, Dark Grey. Special Colours (Lemon, Tango, Post Office Red, Brick Red, Signal Red, National Green, Cherry, Golden Yellow, Navy Blue) attract special prices on request.
